The Point II

Size Chart

The Point II is a true B width size. For a roomier fit, or for those with wider feet, we recommend ordering a wide width size. Learn More

Still not sure what your size is?
Let's Chat
MACHINE WASHABLE

Toss in the wash with cold water. Air dry. Boom.

IN LOVE INSOLE® COMFORT

Features our innovative insole for unbelievable, cushion-like comfort.

RECYCLED PLASTIC BOTTLES

It took about 10 plastic bottles to knit these shoes. See how we calculate it.

Details

The Point II in Black


  • Premium knit upper in black with a smooth, refined shape.
  • Features our In Love Insole® in black for heel-to-toe cushioning and all-day wearability.
  • More spacious toe box for less scrunching and bunching.
  • Added elastic gently expands and contracts for all-day wearability.
  • Black sculpted outsoles provide added comfort and stability.

SKU 152_001_BLK

Washing Instructions

  • All of our styles are machine washable—so they last for the long haul. Learn more.
  • Slip out insoles. Toss insoles and shoes in the wash with cold water. 
  • Air dry. No heat, please.
  • Wear again and again.

Sustainability

  • Knit from Rothy’s signature thread, which is spun from plastic bottles. Learn more.
  • It took about 10 plastic bottles to knit this pair of shoes.
THE POINT II
  • Chic style. A pointed toe box and refined shape offers a sleek silhouette.
  • Perfected fit. Added elastic gently expands and contracts for all-day wearability.
  • Luxe comfort. Features our In Love Insole® for irresistible, all-day comfort.

06/27/26

Pretty Pointy shoe

I wanted a flat with a point and these are great. The toe is narrow but the stretch in the fabric makes it manageable. I love the bright red color - it goes with so many basics (navy, black, white, etc) and dresses up any outfit.

Runs Small

These look wonderful but they run at least a half size small. I own several other pairs of Rothy's, all in my normal size. I made the mistake of thinking they would stretch out and after an hour of wearing them I had 3 blisters on each foot. Unfortunately now I have a pair of nearly new shoes that I...

theyre so comfy, cute and

theyre so comfy, cute and stylish. I get lots of compliments on them. i also use them while i work my 6hour shifts, standing all day as a sales associate. i rate it a 4 cause i feel like there could BE more support in the shoe, but I also havent gotten any blisters from wearing them which is a huge ...

Small :/

Super cute, but not the most comfortable. They rub my ankle. I feel like I’m walking different with them on trying to prevent blisters. And almost too narrow. . I know they’re pointed and are not going to be as wide, but overall they’re pretty uncomfortable :( this is my second pair. I can’t the siz...

Yes you’ll get a blister!

Although, I love love, love my Rothy's, all of the reviews are accurate: one of the heels rubs the back of my foot and causes a blister if I wear them for a long time. I will not return them because I love them, but clearly there is a design issue here.

07/01/26

First pair and eyeing a second!

These are similar to a pair of shoes I bought in Montreal in high school and wore all the time, so they were a fun find for me. I love the fact that they stretch with your foot. Not a touch of that new shoe discomfort, which is huge. :)

  • Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
  • Choosing a selection results in a full page refresh.
By clicking “Accept Cookies”, you agree to the storing of cookies on your device to enhance site navigation, analyze site usage, and assist in our marketing efforts.

How does our website use cookies?

Our website uses cookies (alone or combined) to create a unique device ID, and to distinguish you from other users. This helps us to improve your experience and improve our website. We also use cookies to keep our website secure, to understand how users navigate around the website and to show you advertising when you visit social media platforms and third party websites. Some cookies only last while you use our website. Some cookies are used to remember you when you visit again, and will last for longer. We use strictly necessary cookies if it is in our legitimate interests to do so (balanced with your rights). These are cookies where the storage of (or access to) information is essential rather than reasonably necessary. For instance, we need to use these cookies in order to provide a service to you, to remember items you place in your basket and your location and language preferences. Additionally, these cookies can be strictly necessary in order to comply with a legal obligation that we are subject to. We use all other cookies with your consent. You can choose which cookies to consent to through our Manage Consent Preferences section below.
More information

Manage Consent Preferences

Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

  • Functional Cookies
    Always Active

    These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

Performance Cookies

These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

Targeting Cookies

These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising. We also work with third parties to serve targeted advertisements to people similar to our customer base and those who are similar to visitors to our website or similar to those identified in one or more of our databases. This is done by us uploading a hashed customer list to the third-party (such as through Facebook Custom Audiences or Google Customer Match) or incorporating a pixel from the third-party on our website, and the third-party matches common factors between our data and their data. We also work with social media platforms and other third parties to help serve our ads. We identify certain characteristics and/or interests which we expect to be relevant to individuals interested in our products and our ads are served to those individuals via social media platforms and other third parties which match these. Even if you have disabled certain cookies, our adverts may still be displayed to you through these channels. Please visit your social media platforms preferences to understand more about these ads.
